name: Fecal Immunochemical Test (FIT) Codes
description: CPT, HCPCS, and LOINC codes for fecal immunochemical testing (FIT) and fecal occult blood testing (FOBT). Used in the colorectal cancer screening measure (COL) as an annual screening modality alternative to colonoscopy.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
